mnemonics: Many Minds Recognize Excellent Neighbor Algorithms Daily
Kim's Wacky Knowledge Makes Eighteen Discoveries
keyPoints: 4.2: Nearest-Neighbor Learning - A simple approach to machine learning where the model learns from the most similar data points.
4.3: Weighted K-Nearest-Neighbor Algorithm - A variation of the KNN algorithm where different data points have different weights.
4.4: Local Outlier Factor (LOF) - A measure of similarity between points in a dataset that helps identify outliers.
4.5: k-means Clustering - A clustering algorithm that partitions the data into k clusters based on their similarities.
